subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Ali Akbar
subcodes.first_line: Thou hast been with me for a long time, and I have grown to love thee very much. When I love people
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @exhortations and counsels, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
